text:
Created attachment 191186
Update cacti to 1.1.36

Update cacti to 1.1.36

This is a bugfix release, no need to merge-quarterly.
Committer: please ignore portlint warnings regarding gettext as cacti has internal gettext support.

Poudriere testport logs for 10.4/11.1 i386/amd64 at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.1.36/
